parsed_review.summary: CP00-457 is a descriptor-only analytics-core pack (RP15.P02.M06.S13-RP15.P03.M05.S06, risk C, 150 units) that honestly declares production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false. Read-only inspection of the active implementation refs (contracts/analytics-core-contract.json, packages/analytics/src/registry.js|service.js|validators.js, test/model.test.js, scripts/validate-rp15-analytics-core-contract.mjs) confirms the production_ready claim is fully supported and not overstated: all result objects are Object.freeze'd with exhaustive no-write/no-real-data attestations (writes_product_state:false, synthetic_only:true, no_real_data:true, dispatches_*_runtime:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, executes_unit_test_runtime_paths:false), and local validation emits only production_ready_candidate, never production_ready:true. Deliverable distribution (implementation 62, claude_review 6, ui 12, failure_recovery 8, test 20, contract 22, security_audit 18, hermes_evidence 2 = 150), micro_title and micro_phase counts all match the baseline and sum to 150. The contract pins current_pack=CP00-457 with matching cp457_requirements, cp457_no_write_attestation, embedded p02_closeout_p03_foundation_descriptor, and historical_pack_bindings tail; CP00-457 is the live-open head of closeout-pack-plan.json. Authority boundary holds end to end: claude_is_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human_final_approval_required, and Hermes is used only for deterministic evidence-packet/receipt handling rather than product runtime. Review hardening is satisfied: auth preflight passed with 1445-byte valid JSON (not 0-byte/malformed/tool-call-shaped), and the forbidden_review_evidence list enumerates all CP178+ rejection categories. changed-file-scope correctly isolates active pack files from unrelated dirty files. No P0/P1/P2 issues. Two P3 informational notes: (1) post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) and final-closeout gates (closeout-pack:validate, goal:closeout:validate) are correctly deferred until after this read-only review and must be generated/run before commit; (2) a cosmetic metadata double-listing of the pack evidence dir in changed-file-scope.json. Verdict: PASS; this review does not block closeout, but final closeout still depends on the normal post-review gates and human approval, with production_ready remaining false.

findings.title: Post-review closeout artifacts and final-closeout gates pending (expected sequence)
findings.details: manifest.required_pack_artifacts / evidence_refs (lines 5972-5985) list claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, none of which exist yet (the cp00-457 docs dir currently holds only manifest.json and command-evidence.json). This is the expected pre-closeout state: pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending' with empty valid_review_receipts, and command-evidence.json notes (lines 119-123) correctly defer npm run closeout-pack:validate, the review normalize/receipt steps, and goal:closeout:validate to AFTER this read-only review produces an accepted result. It is not a defect, but closeout must not proceed until these are generated and pass.
findings.recommendation: After accepting this review, generate claude-review-result.json, run finding adjudication and construction inspection, then re-run closeout-pack:validate and goal:closeout:validate (and git diff --check --cached) before commit. Keep production_ready=false and do not claim enterprise trust from local validation.

findings.title: Pack evidence dir double-categorized in changed-file-scope.json
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-457/ (the pack's own evidence directory) is listed under both untracked_implementation_files (line 132) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (line 138). The manifest's worktree_transition_policy.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (manifest.json lines 6019-6027) correctly omits the pack evidence dir. This is a cosmetic metadata inconsistency only; it does not affect scope correctness or this review, since the pack evidence dir is clearly part of CP00-457 and the prompt instructs not to infer unrelated dirty files as in-scope.
findings.recommendation: Drop docs/closeout-packs/cp00-457/ (and any active handoff doc that belongs to this pack) from unrelated_dirty_files_preserved in changed-file-scope.json so the active evidence dir is not labeled unrelated.
